scope: Communications write-flow race/idempotency coverage beyond channel rename and notification read

expected: Two concurrent identical channel member add requests for the same channel/user/role leave exactly one active communication_channel_members row.
Channel member add readback through GET /api/workspace/communication-channels/:channelId exposes one active member entry.
Two concurrent identical notification preference PUT requests for the same user/channel/type leave exactly one notification_preferences row.
Notification preference readback through GET /api/workspace/notification-preferences exposes the final digest/mention preference once.
nonGoals: No e2e tests touched or added.
No production code change without a confirmed failing behavior.
No audit de-duplication assertion in this slice.
